tweet_text: 🚨 Hansi Flick's inspiring half-time talk propelled Barcelona to a stunning 7-2 victory over Newcastle United, securing their place in the Champions League quarterfinals against Atlético Madrid! ⚽️🔥 #ChampionsLeague #FCBarcelona
🚨 Liverpool showcases their dominance with a stunning performance, hailed as the best of the season, as Arne Slot leads the charge! Anfield is roaring again! 🔥⚽️ #LFC #PremierLeague
article_title: Slot defies doubters as Liverpool & Salah deliver season's 'best performance'
